name: 16oz Stoneware LOVE YOU  Mug - Room Essentials™
description:
Show your love for a special person in your life by serving their favorite drink in the 16-Ounce Stoneware Love you Mug from Room Essentials™. This printed mug features the message "Love You" along with a flower and handle in red for contrast against the neutral backdrop. Made of stoneware, the mug is suitable for both hot and cold beverages and can be tossed in the dishwasher for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
